payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Two-seat dark brown/black leather reclining loveseat with padded, segmented backrests and visible stitched seams; right armrest includes a console/cup-holder, upholstery has a slight glossy sheen, left side is slightly edge-cropped in the image; object appears about 2.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark leather reclining loveseat, edge-cropped","long_description":"Two-seat dark brown/black leather reclining loveseat with padded, segmented backrests and visible stitched seams; right armrest includes a console/cup-holder, upholstery has a slight glossy sheen, left side is slightly edge-cropped in the image; object appears about 2.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown/black leather upholstery","reclining two-seat loveseat","padded segmented backrest","visible stitched seams","right armrest console/cup holder","glossy finish","left side edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
